playbook.intent: A weekly pass over the risk register: re-score top 10 by probability×impact, retire stale risks, add new ones from the week's incidents, set next-step owners.
playbook.scope: A weekly pass over the risk register: re-score top 10 by probability×impact, retire stale risks, add new ones from the week's incidents, set next-step owners.

success-criteria.criterion: Every incident mapped to a new or existing risk
Every top-10 risk has refreshed score
Every active risk has owner + next step + date
Top-5 risk broadcast sent within 30 minutes

stage.name: Pre-pull incidents
stage.intent: Bring in fresh signal before scoring.

tasks.task: Pull last week's incidents and near-misses
Tag each as 'represents a new risk' or 'instance of existing risk'
List candidate new risks for the register

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each incident is mapped to a risk (new or existing).

stage.name: Re-score top 10

tasks.task: Walk through the top 10 risks in order
Re-score probability × impact on the same scale
Flag any risk whose score changed by ≥1 level

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every top-10 risk has a refreshed score and a delta note.

stage.name: Retire + add

tasks.task: Retire risks that are clearly resolved
Add the new-risk candidates above the noise floor
Cap the register at a working size (e.g., 30 items)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when retired + added items have written rationale.

stage.name: Owners + next steps
stage.intent: Every active risk gets a step this week.

tasks.task: Assign or refresh an owner per active risk
Define one concrete next step per risk

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every active risk has owner + next step + date.

stage.name: Surface the top 5

tasks.task: Pull the top 5 by re-scored severity
Send a 5-bullet risk update to the project team
Escalate any 'red' risk to leadership / client

stage.decision-gate: Required: top-5 update sent within 30 minutes of the refresh.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content refresh-the-risk-register-in-30-minutes --format md, agent: faion get-content refresh-the-risk-register-in-30-minutes --format context, json: faion get-content refresh-the-risk-register-in-30-minutes --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
